## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] `bun run validate:bun`
- [ ] Manual Raycast smoke, if UI behavior changed

## Safety

- [ ] No API tokens, private Core records, private screenshots, or raw private server responses
- [ ] README or CHANGELOG updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] Unsupported backend behavior is hidden, disabled, or clearly explained
- [ ] No admin-only operation added to the public extension
